about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: AI Engineer & Innovator
about.description: Honours Computer Science graduate from Islamic University (Madinah) with expertise in AI, Data Science, and Full-Stack Development. Multi-award winning innovator (1st place Agenticthon & Future Fintech Hackathons), skilled in Python, ML/DL/NLP, and integrating AI models into scalable applications using LLMs and multi-agent architectures.

leadIn.label: WHAT I DO
leadIn.thesis: I build intelligent systems and the data infrastructure that makes them reliable at scale.
leadIn.scope: Focusing on predictive models, optimized data processing, and RAG pipelines designed for production environments and measurable performance.
leadIn.integration: Beyond models, I architect full-stack ecosystems: secure backends, robust data architectures, and scalable pipelines.

coreEngineering.label: Core Engineering
coreEngineering.title:
Proven stack.
Measurable results.
coreEngineering.p1: I develop applied AI systems using TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and LangChain, structuring workflows and exposing models as services through Flask and FastAPI.
coreEngineering.p2: Integrated into full-stack apps with Next.js, Express.js, and Spring Boot, backed by PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM.
coreEngineering.p3: All projects use disciplined version control, Docker containerization, and are built for stable production deployment.

hero.title: LET'S TALK
hero.subtitle: Have an idea? Let's build something extraordinary together.

faqData.q: What is your main area of expertise?
faqData.a: I am an Honours Computer Science graduate specializing in AI Engineering, Data Science, and Full-Stack Development. My expertise spans ML/DL/NLP, multi-agent AI systems, RAG pipelines, and building scalable intelligent applications.
Absolutely. I'm always open to innovative projects, collaborations, or opportunities that involve AI, Machine Learning, and cutting-edge technology solutions.

faqData.q: What is your typical tech stack for production?
faqData.a: For AI projects, I primarily use Python with TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, and various LLM frameworks. For web applications, my go-to is Next.js, TypeScript, and modern full-stack architectures, often integrated with AI/ML services.

faqData.q: Do you have experience with enterprise or research projects?
faqData.a: Yes, I have experience across research-driven and production environments, from building Transformer-based models and computer vision systems to architecting full-stack platforms with integrated AI capabilities.

faqData.q: How can we start a partnership or project?
faqData.a: The most efficient way is to use the contact form above or reach out directly via email. I'm usually able to respond within 24 hours to discuss how my technical skill set can add value to your initiatives.

personal.title: AI Engineer
personal.subtitle: AI Engineer • Data Scientist | Multi-Award Winning Innovator in AI & Full-Stack
personal.bio: Honours Computer Science graduate from Islamic University (Madinah) with expertise in AI, Data Science, and Full-Stack Development. Multi-award winning innovator (1st place Agenticthon & Future Fintech Hackathons), skilled in Python, ML/DL/NLP, and integrating AI models into scalable applications using LLMs and multi-agent architectures.

project-1.title: AI EEG Signal Converter
project-1.description: Convert EEG brain waves into Arabic words using machine learning with a custom dataset.
project-1.longDescription: A graduation project focused on converting EEG brain wave signals into Arabic words. The system leverages a custom-built dataset and achieves 94% classification accuracy on EEG signal-to-letter conversion through advanced ML and bio-signal processing techniques.

project-2.title: Monjez: Multi-Agent AI Platform
project-2.description: Automated research paper conversion into actionable outputs via multi-agent AI. 1st Place at Agenticthon 2026.
project-2.longDescription: Monjez is a multi-agent AI platform that automates the conversion of research papers into actionable outputs. Built during the Agenticthon 2026 hackathon where it won 1st place, the system integrates LLMs and RAG for highly accurate data extraction and designs automated workflows for academic data processing.

project-3.title: Loan Recommendation Platform
project-3.description: Data-driven system for optimal loan recommendations. 1st Place at Future Fintech Hackathon.
project-3.longDescription: A data-driven loan recommendation platform developed within 48 hours during the Future Fintech Hackathon, where it won 1st place. The system analyzes financial data to provide optimal loan recommendations using machine learning algorithms.

project-4.title: Airline Reservation Application
project-4.description: Unified platform for multi-airline reservations with dynamic flight scheduling and admin controls.
project-4.longDescription: A comprehensive airline reservation application built as a Software Engineering project. The system provides a unified platform for multi-airline reservations, featuring dynamic flight scheduling, admin controls, and a relational database for managing users and bookings.

project-5.title: AI Smart Vision System
project-5.description: AI-powered smart vision for visually impaired users with real-time match commentary.
project-5.longDescription: An AI-powered smart vision system developed during the Scai AI League Hackathon. The system provides visual assistance for visually impaired users and features real-time match following with automated commentary using computer vision and NLP technologies.

cert-2.title: RAG and Agentic AI
